differences.title: 1. COMPILATION
differences.leftDesc: Svelte compiles code at build time, no runtime overhead.
differences.rightDesc: Vue uses a virtual DOM for efficient updates.

differences.title: 2. REACTIVITY
differences.leftDesc: Reactivity is built into Svelte's compiler, no special functions needed.
differences.rightDesc: Vue uses Proxies for deep reactivity tracking.

differences.title: 3. BUNDLE SIZE
differences.leftDesc: Svelte produces extremely small bundles as it ships only the necessary code.
differences.rightDesc: Vue has a small footprint but is larger than Svelte.

differences.title: 4. LEARNING CURVE
differences.leftDesc: Svelte's syntax is close to plain HTML, CSS, and JS.
differences.rightDesc: Vue's template syntax is intuitive but has more concepts.

differences.title: 5. STATE MANAGEMENT
differences.leftDesc: Svelte offers simple, built-in stores for state management.
differences.rightDesc: Vue relies on external libraries like Pinia or Vuex.

differences.title: 6. PERFORMANCE
differences.leftDesc: Svelte's compiled output leads to exceptional runtime performance.
differences.rightDesc: Vue's virtual DOM provides excellent performance.

differences.title: 7. ECOSYSTEM
differences.leftDesc: Svelte's ecosystem is rapidly expanding with new tools and libraries.
differences.rightDesc: Vue has a large, well-established ecosystem and community.
